issues.detail: The instructions focus on happy path scenarios and do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Speed up a slow Vitest suite running on jsdom
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tweaks vitest pool settings without solving the underlying DOM cost; treatment installs happy-dom and sets environment: 'happy-dom' in vitest.config plus the per-file @vitest-environment directive as documented.

scenarios.name: Server-side HTML parsing and extraction without a browser
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for jsdom or cheerio, missing the skill entirely; treatment imports Window from happy-dom, populates document.body.innerHTML, queries with querySelector, and calls window.happyDOM.close() to release resources.
